game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Stardew Valley Stardew Valley is an open-ended farming and life simulation RPG where players restore a dilapidated farm, engaging in activities like planting crops, raising livestock, fishing, mining, and interacting with townspeople. The game operates on a daily and seasonal cycle affecting gameplay, requiring players to manage energy and health, utilize tools, and craft items, while skill levels (farming, mining, etc.) improve over time, unlocking new recipes and abilities.
game_info.description: Welcome to Harvest Haven! Manage your small farm through the seasons. Plant and harvest crops, manage your energy wisely, and build up your farming skills. Each day you have limited energy to work - use it to till soil, plant seeds, water crops, and harvest when ready. Crops grow over multiple days and must be watered daily. Advance through seasons to unlock new crop varieties and watch your farm flourish. Reach the target harvest count to win!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys / WASD: Move your character around the farm
Space: Interact - Till soil, plant seeds, water crops, or harvest
Z: Switch between different seed types
Shift: Speed boost (costs extra energy)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from game over screen)
